description: Use this API to add a bus to the working case and place a zero impedance line between bus BUS and the new bus. No other equipment is connected to the new bus by this API. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = splt(bus, newnum, newnam, newkv)

parameters.name: bus
parameters.description: Number of the bus to be split. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: newnum
parameters.description: Number to be assigned to the new bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: newnam
parameters.description: Name to be assigned to the new bus. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: newkv
parameters.description: Base voltage to be assigned to the new bus. (input; base voltage of bus BUS by default).

error_codes.description: bus number is already assigned to another bus.
bus, branch, or branch ownership tables are full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
